Package com.cloudera.cdp.compute.model

Class Activity

java.lang.Object
com.cloudera.cdp.compute.model.Activity
@Generated(value="com.cloudera.cdp.client.codegen.CdpSDKJavaCodegen", date="2026-01-07T06:42:43.012-08:00") public class Activity extends Object
Represents an individual activity within a workflow execution.
